posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
As you know, Monday as an import feature for importing Trello boards.

Is there any way to select which boards I’m importing?

Currently, in two test imports I’ve done, it imports every board my account has access to. In my case that’s a LONG list of boards from numerous clients I do work for. I end up with 15+ boards importing, just to get the one board I actually want to import.

On each test I didn’t see any option or UI element for selecting which board I want.

Am I overlooking something?

Thanks.
